description: Bug Hunt enemy types - Compendium pp.194-195. 16 alien species rolled on D100.

enemy_table.name: Vent-crawlers
enemy_table.special_rule: When firing at Vent-crawlers within or directly behind cover, do not add Combat Skill.

enemy_table.name: Acid Blobs
enemy_table.special_rule: When an Acid Blob is killed, roll 1D6. On a 1 or 2, place new Blobs equal to the die roll randomly 2" from the slain Blob.

enemy_table.name: Face-rippers
enemy_table.special_rule: Trooper armor only saves on a roll of a 6.

enemy_table.name: Slithering Horrors
enemy_table.special_rule: Troopers with melee weapons can only claim a +1 bonus to Brawling rolls (instead of +2).

enemy_table.name: Tentacle Creepers
enemy_table.special_rule: Creepers receive a 5+ saving throw, except when struck by an Area weapon.

enemy_table.name: Shambling Reanimations
enemy_table.special_rule: Any grunt defeated is immediately replaced by another Reanimation figure.

enemy_table.name: Razor Lizards
enemy_table.special_rule: Defeated troopers who roll for post-battle injuries must add 1 campaign turn to all recovery times. Does not apply to Lost Marine rolls.

enemy_table.name: Berserk Robots
enemy_table.special_rule: 5+ saving throw against all sources of damage.

enemy_table.name: Dimensional Distorts
enemy_table.special_rule: At the end of each round, select a random Distort figure on the battlefield and move it to the center of the battlefield.

enemy_table.name: Horde Invasion Force
enemy_table.special_rule: At the end of each round, if any Horde figures are on the table, 1 additional figure is placed at the center of a random battlefield edge.

enemy_table.name: Converted Infiltration Team
enemy_table.special_rule: Each time a group is revealed, one of the figures is instead set up on the closest Objective.

enemy_table.name: Shatter-forms
enemy_table.special_rule: When killed, all figures within 2" take a Damage 0 hit (including other Shatter-forms).

enemy_table.name: Strangle Worms
enemy_table.special_rule: At the end of each round, roll 1D6 for every Worm on the table. On a 6, another Worm is placed adjacent to it.

enemy_table.name: Gripper Weeds
enemy_table.special_rule: Troopers within 2" of a Gripper Weed cannot move, but may fire normally.

im_too_pretty_to_die.name: I'm Too Pretty to Die
im_too_pretty_to_die.description: Enemy numbers reduced by 1 per Contact reveal.

mega_violence.name: Mega-violence
mega_violence.description: Enemy numbers increased by 1 per Contact reveal.

living_nightmare.name: Living Nightmare
living_nightmare.description: Enemy numbers increased by 1 per Contact reveal. Additional Contact markers spawn on each 6 rolled for Priority.
